title: hbomax-subtitle-deepfix_20260629: Fix all 14 HBO Max subtitle deep analysis issues
design: Fix VTT capture track-switch lock, loose zh-Hans/zh-Hant matching, unbounded MPD body dedup memory, nested MPD fetch deadline, localized label handling, manifest detection consolidation, dead code removal, Max CDN URL checker dedup, code quality fixes (redundant ternary, WEBVTT check, isPriority param, progressive fetch body preservation), and VTT segment capture test coverage gaps. TDD approach: write failing tests first, then fix.
acceptance_criteria: All 14 issues fixed, all 1723+ tests pass, no new lint errors, build succeeds.

title: providers-ux-overhaul_20260630: Providers Tab UI/UX Overhaul
design: UI-layered overhaul of entrypoints/options/sections/ProvidersSection.tsx + catalog data + shared primitives. Sequential TDD across 8 phases. Headline: persist lastTestResult on PoolKey/PoolProvider (survives collapse/navigate, invalidated on credential edit), add getKeyUrl to catalog entries (Groq/OpenRouter/etc. signup links), multi-expand accordion (Set<string>), bulk 'Test all keys' with RPM-respecting sequential run + N/M aggregate, hide key field when requiresApiKey=false (Ollama/LM Studio) + single reveal control, remove stacked double border, distinct disabled-provider visuals, relabel System Prompt editor + swap RotateCcw→FileText title icon, EmptyState primitive for empty pool, Max RPM 600 cap hint, banner 'Next:' microcopy fix, aria-controls/region pairing. Touches types/config.ts (pool model), lib/config.ts (deep-merge + keep lastTestResult out of encrypt loops), lib/openAiCompatibleCatalog.ts (getKeyUrl), lib/providerReadiness.ts (invalidation helper), ProvidersSection.tsx (most UI), entrypoints/options/__tests__/ProvidersSection.test.tsx. Background dispatch/failover out of scope.
acceptance_criteria: 1) Test result (success/fail, latency, age) survives collapse + tab navigation, shown in collapsed header; 2) editing baseUrl/model/apiKey invalidates it; 3) keyed catalog entry shows 'Get a key ↗' opening correct URL; 4) multiple cards expand at once + expand/collapse-all; 5) 'Test all keys' runs sequentially (RPM-respecting) + reports N/M healthy; 6) requiresApiKey=false hides key field + single reveal control + catalog placeholder; 7) disabled providers visually distinct + no double border; 8) EmptyState primitive + 600 RPM hint; 9) pnpm test + pnpm lint + build green, no TS errors.

title: Merge manifest-params onto HBO Max subtitle URLs
Fix HBO Max MPD subtitle fetch HTTP 0 and invalid track URLs
Optimize Max MPD parse deduplication by body content
description: Deduplicate processed manifests by XML body content (in processedMpdBodies Set) to prevent duplicate runs on updated manifest URLs, and reduce MAX_MPD_IN_FLIGHT_CAP_MS to 15s to fall back to DOM cues faster.

title: Prevent repeated fetches of failed Max subtitle track URLs
description: Mark track URLs as processed immediately in fetchAndEmitSubtitleTrack so that failed, circular, or empty tracks are not re-fetched on every subsequent manifest polling event.

title: Fix circular nested manifest loops during Max subtitle fetch
description: Track seen manifests in a Set to prevent relative CDN resolution loops when Max subtitle track segments return manifests instead of VTT content.

title: Fix extension context invalidated errors and resolve Max MPD subtitle fallback
description: Resolve zombie content script contexts on reload/update and fix the Max MPD subtitle selection language mismatch to prevent DOM cue fallback.

title: Fix Max MPD subtitle URL fallback
description: Runtime logs show Max MPD subtitle tracks resolving back to the MPD manifest URL, causing subtitle fetches to receive manifest XML instead of subtitle content. Investigate and fix URL extraction so valid subtitle segment URLs are preferred.
notes: Latest logs show MPD tracks discovered but no parsed/unavailable logs before DOM fallback. Hypothesis: progressive SegmentTemplate fetching is taking too long because unknown segment counts are fetched sequentially up to a high cap.
close_reason: Capped unknown progressive Max MPD segment fetches to avoid long stalls, added regression coverage, and verified compile/lint/tests

title: Fix HBO Max and Max subtitle selectors for rebranded player
description: Update selectors in inject/subtitleHandlers/hbomax.ts to match the rebranded Max web player DOM (handling aria-label settings, role=radio buttons for language tracks, and CSS class wildcards for cue rendering) while retaining compatibility fallback for legacy HBO Max players.

title: Fix HBO Max subtitle tiers and test window ReferenceError
description: Fix three bugs in subtitleCoordinator preventing manifest/TextTrack/MSE tiers from working on HBO Max: 1) selectSubtitleTrack short-circuits to DOM activation; 2) processTracksDiscovered discards pre-parsed manifest tracks; 3) state.isOverlayMode prevents upgrading. Also guard window.location in isOnWatchPage to prevent ReferenceError in tests.
close_reason: Fixed HBO Max subtitle tiers and coordinator watch-page unhandled ReferenceError.

title: coursera-udemy-handler-fixes_20260623: Comprehensive fix and improvement of Coursera and Udemy subtitle handlers based on deep analysis
design: Fix 16 findings across Coursera and Udemy subtitle handlers: P1 (CDN interception, videoId extraction, locale preservation, sprite filter false positives), P2 (domain detection, subtitlesVtt array, variable shadowing, data.results removal, isAutoGenerated, language extractors), P3 (parseSubtitles format auto-detection, dead code removal, error logging, coordinator isWatchPage cleanup), plus full unit test coverage for extractAvailableTracks, detect, isWatchPage, getMetadataPatterns, and language extractors.
acceptance_criteria: All 16 findings resolved, comprehensive unit tests added for both handlers, all tests passing, 0 lint errors, 0 type errors, build OK

title: audit-v2_20260623: Codebase Audit v2 - Deep Analysis Fixes & Improvements
design: Comprehensive fix track addressing ~80 findings from June 2026 deep codebase analysis. 6 phases organized by severity: P0 crashes (subtitle translatedCues, PDF Hooks violation, removeTranslation scope, deduplicateAncestors logic), P1 high bugs (semaphore bypass, section cleanup, timer leaks, undefined response, duplicate IDs, stale closure, fade timeout, unvalidated import), P2 security (SSRF, file:// access, cleartext API key, prompt injection, partial translations, debug logging, cache race, XHR issues), P2 performance (memory leaks, missing timeouts, stat overcounting, layout thrashing, O(N^2) sync, observer churn), P3 services/lib (nullish coalescing, constants, error handling, batching), P3 content/inject/UI (dead code, timer tracking, type fixes, component consolidation).
acceptance_criteria: All P0 crashes resolved with tests. All P1 bugs resolved with tests. All P2 security issues mitigated. All P2 performance issues addressed. All P3 minor issues fixed. pnpm test passes. pnpm lint passes. tsc --noEmit passes. wxt build succeeds.
notes:
COMPLETED: Phases 1-3 (27 tasks, ~25% of track). 1206 tests pass (+11 new). tsc/eslint clean.
COMMITS: cc3ec54 (P0), cf63851 (P1), e3d6600 (P2 security) — local on master, NOT pushed.
KEY DECISIONS: (1) per-phase sequential execution not parallel workers (shared files collide); (2) semaphore-per-chunk not per-function; (3) timer cleanup in nav handler not resetCoordinatorState (breaks fake-timer tests); (4) invalidateDebugCache must not force false; (5) prompt-injection = delimiters+cap+preamble; (6) per-invocation state in closure not module scope.
IN PROGRESS: Phase 4 Task 1 (categoryStore.initTabCleanup) — NOT started.
NEXT: Phase 4 (13 tasks: timeouts, stat overcounting, ApiError class, batching, layout thrashing, observer churn).
BLOCKER: none.
HANDOFF: Section 1 saved at conductor/tracks/audit-v2_20260623/handoff_20260623_121500.md
REMAINING: Phase 4 (13), Phase 5 (14), Phase 6 (36) = 63 tasks.

title: subtitle-deep-analysis-fixes_20260622: Comprehensive fix and improvement of subtitle feature addressing 50 findings from deep analysis across all supported sites
design: Phased parallel execution: 5 independent phases (parser fixes, interceptor hardening, DOM cue source, background service, platform handlers) run concurrently, followed by sequential coordinator overhaul, overlay improvements, test coverage, and final verification. 38 tasks total across 9 phases.
acceptance_criteria: 1. XHR interceptor uses translationTimeout setting, overrides both responseText and response. 2. DOM cue buffer capped at 200 cues, findActiveCue uses binary search. 3. No concurrent track-mixing race. 4. Background sends chunk deltas not full arrays. 5. Coordinator caches settings, zero loadSettings in hot paths. 6. Native subtitles restored on failure. 7. updateCues no flicker. 8. parseTimestamp handles MM:SS.mmm. 9. Single findPrimaryVideo. 10. All handlers have languageExtractor/videoId/metadata. 11. Message handling uses sendResponse properly. 12. isOnWatchPage delegated to handlers. 13. Dead code removed. 14. Tests for interceptors/DOM scraper/textTrack/YouTube parser. 15. All tests pass, lint clean, build succeeds.

title: subtitle-site-toggles: Subtitle Supported Sites Display & Per-Site Toggle
Phase 8: Final Verification — Full pnpm test + pnpm lint + build green; resolve regressions; no TS errors.

Phase 6: Readiness Banner, Empty State & System Prompt — Relabel 'Global System Prompt (advanced)' + RotateCcw→FileText title icon; EmptyState primitive + inline CTA; Max RPM 600 cap hint; banner 'Next:' microcopy fix.

Phase 5: Test-Status Surfacing & Bulk Test — Write lastTestResult after each test + invalidation wiring; status dot/tooltip in collapsed header; 'Test all keys' banner action (RPM-respecting sequential + N/M aggregate).

Phase 4: Key Row & API-Key Field — Remove duplicate reveal control (rely on Input eye); hide key field when requiresApiKey=false + catalog placeholder + Get-a-key link; disabled-Test reason hint; scroll new key into view.

Phase 3: Provider Card Interaction & Visuals — Multi-expand accordion (expandedProviderIds Set<string> + expand/collapse-all); remove stacked double hairline border; distinct styling for disabled providers in collapsed header.

Phase 2: Catalog Get-Key Links — Add getKeyUrl field to OpenAiCompatibleCatalogEntry + populate real signup URLs (OpenRouter/Groq/NVIDIA/Together/Fireworks/Mistral); getKeyUrlForProvider(baseUrl) helper.

Phase 1: Persisted Test-Status Data Model — Add lastTestResult (success/at/latencyMs/error) to PoolKey & PoolProvider; migration-tolerant deep-merge (keep out of encrypt loops); pure invalidation helper clearing result on baseUrl/model/apiKey change.
Max MPD subtitle fetch returns circular manifest reference for all tracks
description: HBO Max/Max MPD processor extracts subtitle tracks that appear to be valid VTT segment URLs, but fetching them returns the same DASH MPD body as the root manifest. This triggers circular-manifest detection for every track, leaves cueCount=0, and forces DOM fallback. Need to investigate whether the resolved segment URLs are manifest-echo URLs and update the fetch/nested-MPD logic so we stop looping and either resolve real segments or bail out cleanly to DOM/VTT capture.

title: multi-provider-pool_20260626: Multi-Provider Pool with Round-Robin & Circuit-Breaker Failover
design: Coordinator hangs off the single initService() seam (services/background.ts:232) and the fetchWithRetry() network chokepoint (services/openaiCompatible.ts:321). ProviderPoolCoordinator implements TranslationService, holds N OpenAICompatibleService instances (one per enabled provider-key slot), and delegates per call with round-robin cursor (lib/poolCursor.ts) + circuit breaker (lib/circuitBreaker.ts) + pool resolver (lib/poolResolver.ts). Per-key RateLimiter (existing lib/rateLimiter.ts, already per-instance). Circuit breaker: 429/5xx/network -> escalating cooldown 60->120->300s capped; 401/403 -> long-open 1h + credentialInvalid; failover retries up to healthySlotCount times then surfaces last error. New providers:PoolProvider[] on ExtensionSettings (providers x keys), per-key AES-GCM encryption loop in lib/config.ts, migration of legacy single provider into pool[0]. New Providers manager Options section (collapsible provider cards + PoolKeyRow with live status badge + Add-from-catalog modal). All 7 translation paths covered in one place.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: 2 enabled keys alternate requests. AC-2: 429 key skipped for cooldown then auto-rejoins. AC-3: 401 key flagged invalid, skipped, UI shows badge, re-test restores. AC-4: two keys @60rpm sustain ~120rpm. AC-5: legacy single-provider user migrates to pool[0] with zero behavior change. AC-6: all 7 translation paths (page/subtitle/PDF/selection/hover/inline/category-detect) route through coordinator with no per-path changes. AC-7: pnpm test/lint/compile/build pass; new modules >=80% coverage.
notes:
EPIC COMPLETE: Multi-Provider Pool with Round-Robin & Circuit-Breaker Failover.
7 phases, 19 tasks. 107 new tests. All quality gates pass (tsc clean, eslint at baseline, build 3.82MB).
Pure libs: poolCursor, circuitBreaker, poolResolver. Coordinator at initService() seam covers all 7 paths.
DEFAULT_SETTINGS seeds default pool for backward compat. ProvidersSection UI + syncProviderToPool wizard bridge.
Final commit: 0f19619
close_reason: Epic complete — all 7 phases + 19 tasks done

title: Coordinator source precedence state (manifest > texttrack > mse > dom)
design: TDD. Per-video activeSource: 'manifest'|'texttrack'|'mse'|'dom'|null. First full-track source (precedence: manifest > texttrack > mse) to resolve wins and suppresses lower tiers + DOM scraping for current video. Track-switch/seek resets activeSource to allow re-resolution. DOM scraping remains unconditional fallback when no higher tier resolves.
acceptance_criteria: Precedence enforced: higher tier suppresses lower; track-switch/seek resets; DOM fallback still works when no higher tier resolves.
notes: COMPLETED: Phase 5 - Commit 40d4aa9

title: Coordinator MSE->translate flow
design: TDD. Coordinator handles SUBTITLE_MSE_CUES progressively, feeding deltas into chunked translate path (mirrors DOM-cue delta handling). Precedence lower than manifest + texttrack (Phase 5 finalizes).
acceptance_criteria: MSE cue deltas flow into translation pipeline; no regression to manifest/texttrack/DOM paths; precedence wiring deferred to Phase 5.

title: MSE SourceBuffer interceptor module (mseInterceptor)
design: TDD. inject/mseInterceptor.ts. Monkey-patch MediaSource.prototype.addSourceBuffer (tag text/vtt|application/mp4 buffers) + SourceBuffer.prototype.appendBuffer (decode via TextDecoder, detect WebVTT/IMSC1, parse WebVTT, emit SUBTITLE_MSE_CUES). Idempotent + BFCache-safe teardown matching FetchInterceptor (capture originals in instance fields; restore only identity-equal).
acceptance_criteria: AC4: fixture WebVTT segment from appendBuffer parsed into correct SubtitleCue[]; idempotent enable/disable; BFCache-safe.

Reuse metadata-detection cloning pattern.

title: Phase 5: Source Precedence Integration & Full Verification

manifest-subtitle-access: Upgrade streaming subtitle access to Tiers 2/4/3

All feed existing chunked translate pipeline. Build order T2 -> T4 -> T3. HBO Max is first concrete consumer; Netflix/Amazon/Vimeo benefit from generic engine.

AC2: FetchInterceptor detects manifest content-types, emits SUBTITLE_TRACKS_DISCOVERED, never blocks playback. AC3: textTrackDiscovery emits full track.cues as SubtitleCue[]. AC4: mseInterceptor parses fixture WebVTT segment from appendBuffer. AC5: All new modules unit-tested; full suite passes; lint clean; wxt build succeeds. AC6: HBO Max handler routes through generic manifest engine via getManifestPatterns().

title: Write failing tests for lib/rateLimiter.ts (RED)
design: TDD red phase: tests for unlimited fast-path, under-cap grant, at-cap wait (fake timers), 60s pruning, setMaxRpm reconfigure, concurrent acquire serialization, bounded window length

title: Phase 4: Options UI — Rate Limiting Card
Phase 1: Pure RPM Rate Limiter Module
max-rpm_20260624: Feature settings to let users set max RPM to avoid too many requests to providers that have rate limits
design: RPM sliding-window limiter (rolling 60s timestamp window) placed at the single network chokepoint OpenAICompatibleService.fetchWithRetry so it governs every provider call (translate, subtitle, selection, testConnection, detectPageCategory, classifyPdfParagraphs). Pure lib/rateLimiter.ts module with createRateLimiter(maxRpm) returning acquire/setMaxRpm/getMaxRpm. maxRpm flows ExtensionSettings.maxRpm -> ProviderConfig.maxRpm -> initService -> OpenAICompatibleService.updateConfig -> rateLimiter.setMaxRpm. Hot-applies via existing onSettingsChange -> initService path. Default OFF (maxRpm: 0 = unlimited fast-path). On cap hit: silently wait/queue until window frees (bounded by existing 30s semaphore queue timeout). Options -> Advanced -> new Rate Limiting card (Gauge icon, FieldGroup + numeric Input, blur-validate integer 0..600, auto-save). Options-only, no popup control.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: maxRpm:0 (default) -> full existing 1482-test suite passes unchanged, no latency change. AC-2: maxRpm:N -> N+1th call within 60s waits until window frees (verifiable via rateLimiter.test.ts fake timers). AC-3: every provider call path governed (all route through fetchWithRetry). AC-4: Options Advanced shows validated Rate Limiting card, persists to ExtensionSettings.maxRpm, hot-applies on next request. AC-5: invalid input (negative/non-integer/>600/empty) rejected with inline error, not written to storage. AC-6: changing maxRpm takes effect without reload (onSettingsChange -> initService -> updateConfig). AC-7: survives export/import (in AdvancedSection export object). AC-8: pnpm lint, compile (tsc --noEmit), test, build all pass.

title: Sub-project 3: Per-film proper-noun extraction (spec → plan → impl)
description: Brainstorm → spec → plan → implement per-film proper-noun extraction for the subtitle pipeline. Pre-scan + persist model: dedicated extraction call before chunk 0, persisted keyed by content hash of cue corpus, seeds all chunks. Separate namespace from translation cache. Sibling to merged sub-projects 1+2 (profiles, prompt, bidirectional context, rolling glossary).

title: 7.2: Improve hideNativeCaptions strategy
design: Use display:none or opacity:0 instead of visibility:hidden
acceptance_criteria: No blank space from hidden native captions

title: 7.1: Add accessibility attributes to overlay
design: Add role=caption, aria-live=polite, aria-label
acceptance_criteria: Overlay has ARIA accessibility attributes

title: 6.10: Remove interceptTimeout from coordinator state
design: Remove unused field and comment
acceptance_criteria: No dead state fields

title: 6.9: Replace module-level singleton with class instance
design: SubtitleCoordinator class with state as instance property, factory function
acceptance_criteria: Testable class-based coordinator

title: 6.8: Fix coordinator message handling
design: Use sendResponse for GET_AVAILABLE_TRACKS and SELECT_SUBTITLE_TRACK, skip direct fetch
acceptance_criteria: Proper message response contract

title: 6.7: Implement binary search for findActiveCue
design: Binary search on startTime-sorted cues
acceptance_criteria: O(log n) lookup per timeupdate

title: 6.6: Fix findActiveCue to return most recent match after seek
design: Return last matching cue or closest startTime without exceeding currentTime
acceptance_criteria: Correct cue displayed after seek

title: 6.5: Fix updateCues flicker
design: Only reset currentCueIndex when array changes, content equality check
acceptance_criteria: No DOM flicker on chunk updates

title: 6.4: Restore native subtitles on translation failure
design: Send original body on failure, only blank after overlay active, add retry toast
acceptance_criteria: Native subtitles restored on failure, retry available

title: 6.3: Deduplicate auto-activate and interceptor flows
design: Record fetchedTrackUrls, skip interceptor for already-fetched URLs
acceptance_criteria: No double translation sessions for same content

title: 6.2: Add track identity guard to handleIntercepted
design: Track activeTrackIdentity, cancel previous session on track change
acceptance_criteria: No concurrent track-mixing race

title: 6.1: Cache settings in coordinator
design: Load once at startup, refresh via storage.onChanged, replace hot path loadSettings
acceptance_criteria: Zero loadSettings calls in handleDomCues/handleIntercepted

title: 5.6: Move isOnWatchPage into handler interface
design: Add isWatchPage to SubtitleHandler, implement per handler
acceptance_criteria: No hardcoded platform checks in coordinator
